steps.title: Identify the sentence's role
steps.content: The underlined sentence says the novel's Blackfeet main characters helped ensure that Indigenous people have a place in horror. It emphasizes the importance of that representation.

steps.title: Rule out other functions
steps.content: B introduces reader purchasing behavior, C predicts future choices by non-Indigenous authors, and D discusses a biographical claim; none appears in the sentence. The sentence highlights the portrayal's significance and also connects the novel's Indigenous characters to the broader place of Indigenous people in horror. The answer is A.
